assertions.title: Screenshot shows dark mode with quote results

steps.observed: File exists at /Users/bryan/code/compare-dex-routers/docs/screenshot.png (315929 bytes, modified Mar 10 23:00)

steps.action: Visually inspect screenshot for dark mode and quote results
steps.expected: Dark background, at least one router's quote results visible
steps.observed: Screenshot shows dark theme (black background), WETH->USDC on Base chain, Curve quote panel showing 'YOU RECEIVE 3984...', router name 'CURVE', 'Via Curve', 'Gas Cost', 'Router address' all visible. Green 'RECOMMENDED' badge present.
Found exact match: '![Web UI screenshot](docs/screenshot.png)' in README.md

steps.action: Check image dimensions using Python struct
steps.observed: Width: 1617px, Height: 1200px — well above the 800px minimum
svelte-check found 0 errors and 0 warnings. tsc --noEmit clean. Exit code 0.
3 warnings (pre-existing complexity warnings per AGENTS.md), 0 errors. Exit code 0.
23 test files, 406 tests all passed. Exit code 0.

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:5173 with agent-browser session b833ce218e19__u3

steps.observed: Screenshot shows chain selector, From/To token inputs, Exact Input/Output toggle, YOU SELL/RECEIVE fields, slippage buttons, COMPARE QUOTES button — all within 375px with no visible overflow

assertions.title: Dark mode consistency for new elements (clear buttons)

steps.action: Click ThemeToggle button to switch to dark mode
steps.observed: Clicked theme toggle twice (system -> light -> dark). document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') returned 'dark'

steps.action: Type 'WETH' in From token input to trigger clear button appearance
steps.observed: button 'Clear from token' [ref=e5] appeared in accessibility snapshot

steps.action: Take annotated screenshot in dark mode with clear button visible
steps.expected: X button visible with correct dark mode styling
steps.observed: Screenshot shows dark background, 'WETH' text in input, '×' (clear) button visible at right edge of From token input

steps.action: Inspect computed styles of clear button
steps.expected: 44x44px touch target, uses var(--text) or similar CSS custom property colors
steps.observed: box: 44x44 at (918, 209), color: rgb(224, 224, 224) (light grey appropriate for dark mode), font: 20px system-ui

frictions.description: ThemeToggle button has aria-label 'Theme: system' (not 'ThemeToggle' or 'Toggle dark mode') and does not show up in agent-browser snapshot -i by default. Required JavaScript evaluation to discover its aria-label, then used `find role button click --name 'Theme: system'` to interact.
frictions.resolution: Used `agent-browser eval` to list all buttons with aria-labels, then found the theme toggle's accessible name was 'Theme: system', then cycled it twice (system -> light -> dark) to reach dark mode

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. docs/screenshot.png exists (1617x1200px, dark mode with Curve quote results). README.md reference is intact. Typecheck/lint/tests all exit 0 (406 tests pass). At 375px no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=clientWidth=375). In dark mode, clear (X) buttons render correctly with 44x44px touch target and appropriate light grey color on dark background.
